rationale: Add grammar variants to cover deep‑merge, boolean conversion, hook failures, flag combos, nested templates, extra newline, repo URLs and config path expansion.

updates.replacement:
invocation_object
    : '{' "no_input" ':' 'true' ',' "extra_context" ':' extra_context_object ',' "replay" ':' 'null' ',' "overwrite_if_exists" ':' json_bool ',' "skip_if_file_exists" ':' json_bool ',' "accept_hooks" ':' json_bool ',' "keep_project_on_failure" ':' json_bool ',' "output_dir_state" ':' output_dir_state '}'
    | '{' "no_input" ':' 'false' ',' "extra_context" ':' '{}' ',' "replay" ':' replay_value ',' "overwrite_if_exists" ':' json_bool ',' "skip_if_file_exists" ':' json_bool ',' "accept_hooks" ':' json_bool ',' "keep_project_on_failure" ':' json_bool ',' "output_dir_state" ':' output_dir_state '}'
    // mixed flag combinations
    | '{' "no_input" ':' 'false' ',' "extra_context" ':' extra_context_object ',' "replay" ':' 'null' ',' "overwrite_if_exists" ':' 'true' ',' "skip_if_file_exists" ':' 'false' ',' "accept_hooks" ':' json_bool ',' "keep_project_on_failure" ':' json_bool ',' "output_dir_state" ':' output_dir_state '}'
    | '{' "no_input" ':' 'false' ',' "extra_context" ':' extra_context_object ',' "replay" ':' 'null' ',' "overwrite_if_exists" ':' 'false' ',' "skip_if_file_exists" ':' 'true' ',' "accept_hooks" ':' json_bool ',' "keep_project_on_failure" ':' json_bool ',' "output_dir_state" ':' output_dir_state '}'
    ;
